description: Run the PuffeRL PPO+LSTM training script on a chosen environment, writing a training log and checkpoints under record_store. Local compute — no remote service is mutated.
rules: local compute: writes only under record_store (training log + checkpoints), never mutates a remote service
ENV_NAME selects the environment (default procgen-coinrun); NUM_ENVS / NUM_ITERATIONS / DEVICE tune the run
requires pufferlib + torch (and a GPU for real throughput); degrades gracefully to a logged note when the stack is absent
usage: Set ENV_NAME, NUM_ENVS, NUM_ITERATIONS, DEVICE (cpu|cuda). Output: train.log (training stdout/stderr or the absent-stack note); checkpoints under record_store/checkpoints when training runs.
limitation: Real training needs pufferlib + torch installed and ideally a CUDA GPU; without them the porter records that the stack is absent and exits cleanly. No hyperparameter search is performed.
